mapper.sql: SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_type AS conversationType, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(f.remark, ''), other_u.nickname, c.conversation_name) WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(g.group_name, c.conversation_name) ELSE c.conversation_name END AS conversationName, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(other_u.avatar_url, c.avatar_url) WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(g.avatar_url, c.avatar_url) ELSE c.avatar_url END AS avatarUrl, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 AND current_gm.status != 1 THEN ( SELECT CASE m.msg_type WHEN 3 THEN '[图片]' WHEN 5 THEN '[文件]' ELSE m.content END FROM im_message m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.seq_no <= cu.last_read_seq ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.last_message_preview END AS lastMessagePreview, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 AND current_gm.status != 1 THEN ( SELECT m.sent_at FROM im_message m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.seq_no <= cu.last_read_seq ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE c.last_message_time END AS lastMessageTime, cu.unread_count AS unreadCount, cu.is_top AS isTop, cu.is_mute AS isMute, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 1 THEN other_cu.user_id ELSE NULL END AS peerUserId, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 THEN c.biz_id ELSE NULL END AS groupId, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 2 AND current_gm.status != 1 THEN COALESCE(( SELECT m.seq_no FROM im_message m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.seq_no <= cu.last_read_seq ORDER BY m.seq_no DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) ELSE COALESCE(lm.seq_no, 0) END AS latestSeq

FROM im_conversation_user cu JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = cu.conversation_id LEFT JOIN im_message lm ON lm.id = c.last_message_id LEFT JOIN im_conversation_user other_cu ON c.conversation_type = 1 AND other_cu.conversation_id = c.id AND other_cu.user_id != #{userId} LEFT JOIN im_user other_u ON other_u.id = other_cu.user_id LEFT JOIN im_friend f ON f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_user_id = other_u.id LEFT JOIN im_group g ON c.conversation_type = 2 AND g.id = c.biz_id LEFT JOIN im_group_member current_gm ON c.conversation_type = 2 AND current_gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND current_gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: LEFT JOIN im_group_member gm ON c.conversation_type = 2 AND gm.group_id = c.biz_id AND gm.user_id = #{userId} WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 AND (c.conversation_type != 2 OR gm.status = 1) ORDER BY cu.is_top DESC, c.last_message_time DESC, c.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_conversation_user cu JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = cu.conversation_id WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1

SELECT id, conversation_type AS conversationType, biz_key AS bizKey, biz_id AS bizId, conversation_name AS conversationName, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, last_message_id AS lastMessageId, last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation WHERE conversation_type = 1 AND biz_key = #{bizKey} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, conversation_type AS conversationType, biz_key AS bizKey, biz_id AS bizId, conversation_name AS conversationName, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, last_message_id AS lastMessageId, last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation WHERE conversation_type = 2 AND biz_id = #{groupId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, conversation_type AS conversationType, biz_key AS bizKey, biz_id AS bizId, conversation_name AS conversationName, avatar_url AS avatarUrl, last_message_id AS lastMessageId, last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation WHERE id = #{conversationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE im_conversation SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_preview = #{lastMessagePreview}, last_message_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{conversationId}
